# dischargeinjunction.org

> Guide to the discharge injunction under 11 U.S.C. Section 524.

dischargeinjunction.org is a free, open-source educational resource about the permanent discharge injunction in bankruptcy. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://dischargeinjunction.org/: Overview of the discharge injunction and post-discharge protections
- https://dischargeinjunction.org/debt-collection-after-discharge.html: Debt collection after discharge -- your rights and remedies

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
